title: Polls support (GET/POST /api/v1/polls)
description: Spec says skip in v1, but Ivory and Phanpy show poll UI and some clients fail ungracefully if poll endpoints 404. At minimum: accept poll params on post creation, store in a polls table, render in Status JSON, allow voting via POST /api/v1/polls/:id/votes. Remote polls from federation should display read-only.
close_reason: Skipped — low value for single-operator instance, clients degrade gracefully
